Chart bank / 08 · Funnel
Chart 08 · Conversion & hierarchy

Funnel & pyramid

Two complementary shapes for stage-flow content. Funnel = top-to-bottom conversion (volume narrows as we filter through stages). Pyramid = bottom-to-top hierarchy (Maslow-style: foundation at the base, ambition at the apex).

AFunnel · top-to-bottom · 4 stages
760×460
BPyramid · Maslow-style · foundation → apex
760×460
◐System check · light · dark · highlight
3 backgrounds × same data
